rationale: In the citing paper, Baumgartner and Steenkamp (2006) is cited in the introduction only as part of a grouped background claim that response styles are content-irrelevant influences on survey responses. The paper's core contributions - the IRT ERS measurement model, testlet and varying-item-parameter extensions, simulation design, and multilevel antecedent analysis - are developed without a clear, specific reliance on that 2006 article. There is no distinct discussion of this cited paper's framework or findings beyond general contextual support.
